current_life_events: The friend group reunion is now over, but it didn't go as smoothly as he'd hoped; a few friends didn't show up, and he felt like he was forcing conversations; he's been putting off planning a new dinner party due to fear of another low turnout.
mental_state: Feeling uncertain about his role in the friend group and struggling to come to terms with the fact that things can't stay the same forever.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The reunion's mixed results have left him questioning his self-worth, body image, and friendships, while also procrastinating on planning new social events due to fear of failure.
